notes:
v0.1.6: Branding & Global Polish
- Rebranding: Officially renamed to 'Lieb Player' across the entire interface
- Global Ready: 100% localization of all tooltips, metadata, and interface labels in English, French, and Spanish
- UI Refinement: New integrated progress button for updates and fixed subtitle list clipping
- Security: Removed hardcoded API keys; each user now manages their own credentials
- Consistency: Standardized app name in all system manifests and metadata
